---
title: "CHENFEI LIU"
---

::: {data-aos="fade-up"}
# 🧑‍🚀 Space Crew: CHENFEI LIU

**Faculty:** \[ICDI\] *(Notice: Student ID strictly hidden)*
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::::::: columns
::: {.column width="48%" data-aos="fade-right"}
### 📸 Solo at NARIT (1pt)

![](images/clipboard-1293746852.jpeg){.rounded}
:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

:::: {.column width="48%" data-aos="fade-left"}
### 🎥 Personal Vlog (1pt)

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9}
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/fSBnNh-L3Lg" title="NARIT Vlog" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen>

</iframe>
:::
::::
:::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {data-aos="fade-up"}
### 💭 Personal Impressions (1pt)

Visiting NARIT felt like stepping into a different universe. As a “travel blogger” for the day, I was amazed by how the space exhibitions and planetarium combined science with immersive storytelling. The atmosphere was both educational and inspiring, making astronomy feel exciting rather than distant or complicated.

### 💡 Knowledge Gained (1pt)

During the visit, I learned how the planetarium projection system simulates celestial movements and recreates realistic night skies. I also gained a better understanding of black holes, light spectra, and how telescopes collect and process astronomical data to study distant galaxies.

### 🚀 Future Applications (1pt)

This experience broadened my perspective on how science can be communicated in creative and engaging ways. In the future, I can apply these insights to improve presentation skills, integrate technology into learning, and develop more interactive and experience-based projects within my field.
:::
